entry.title: Re: How to send dunning letters to customer Standard E-Ma...
entry.content: Hello Chris, First of all, thank you very much for your response. I have already checked the OPD and tried to find a way to maintain the customer's standard email address as the recipient. However, I could not find this information in the links you sent me either. Using the default email address still triggers the email to be sent to the clerk's internet address. Could you please specify what I should enter as the email address for the email recipient?

entry.title: Tds outgoing payment : Add multiple rows
entry.content:
My client is located in india, so he's using TDS
I have many TDS entries on the system on many Sections for both assesse types and for 2 different locations
When he tries to perform TDS outgoing payment he is not able to create multiple rows  to add other TDS entries for a different assessee type or a different section

Only one row is possible with one section and one assessee type which make it very long to do different payment for each assessee and each section.

Anyone can help please ?

entry.title: Re: Set visible dependent on selected members in Input Co...
entry.content:
@PaulaSAC @CLTGravesen 

You can follow the instruction on how to read the Input Control member from the below post. I would just like to add on setting up the correct image of the flag based on selected Input Control country. I am not sure how many possible countries you are dealing with. If they are just a few you could Create an Image object per country and then use the .setVisible properties of the image. 

 

If the countries list is more the better way could be to use the below url as a source of the Image using the method setImage. My example is for just US but you can follow the same approach for other countries.

var country = "US";
Image_1.setImage(" https://flagpedia.net/data/flags/w580/" + country.toLowerCase() + ".webp");

below is how it shows up in stories.

Hope this helps !

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: FI-CA FX Valuation with Trading Partner Info
entry.content:
To add VBUND (Trading Partner Company Code) in the FX document, you need to implement an enhancement in the structures FKK100 or FKK100N.

Within these structures, you will find the customer include structures:

  • CI_ZFKK100

  • CI_ZFKK100N

These includes can be enhanced to add custom fields such as VBUND, which can then be used to derive the trading partner company code in the FX valuation document.

For older implementations, enhancing CI_ZFKK100 was sufficient and worked correctly. However, for newer implementations, you may also need to enhance CI_ZFKK100N.

Recommended approach:

  1. First enhance the include CI_ZFKK100 and add the required fields such as VBUND.

  2. Test the process with new data.

  3. If the field is still not transferred to the FX document, then enhance CI_ZFKK100N as well.

Both CI_ZFKK100 and CI_ZFKK100N are customer include structures designed for such extensions.

Additionally, you may also need to add the field SHKZG (Debit/Credit Indicator) in the same include structure so that the debit/credit information is correctly transferred to the valuation postings.

In structure FKK100N, these CI includes are used to define customer-specific account assignment fields for foreign currency valuation (for example, business place or trading partner). These fields can then be transferred to the valuation postings.

However, note that these fields may not appear in the ALV display under the Single Records and Postings views.

For reference, you can also review the following SAP Notes:

  • SAP Note 2659631

  • SAP Note 3294782

These notes may not contain the exact implementation steps but reference the relevant structures that can help guide the enhancement.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Process Automation: Problem with POST Action and CSRF-Token
entry.content: Hi @Marco, facing the same issue in my project. The action is working via Test action project and postman, but when added to the process flow getting error. According to your suggested solution how you manged to add '/' in Resource path as it shows invalid. Any suggestion would be helpful. Error : "Add new entity to XXXX" failed Error message: Action 'XXX' failed with the following error: 'Error thrown from action runtime library: Could not fetch X-CSRF token for action 'Add new entity to XXXX': X-CSRF token missing in the response headers of GET call to XXXX'. Thanks Chanchal

entry.title: Implementing SAP Business Data Cloud and AI with SAP open data ecosystem
entry.content:
Ever had a customer say, “We love our SAP data… but what about everything else?”

That’s exactly where this session comes in.

We’ll dive into how SAP Business Data Cloud, powered by the SAP open data ecosystem, helps you extend data boundaries and activate AI/ML across SAP and non-SAP sources.  The thing is, AI only gets exciting when it’s fed the right data and when teams actually know how to use it.

From delta share scenarios to hands-on data scientist features like notebooks, we’ll connect strategy to execution.  And yes, we’ll also give you a preview of what’s ahead on the AI roadmap.

Think of it as moving from “we store data” to “we create intelligence”.  Big difference.

Let’s build solutions that customers didn’t even realize were possible.

Register now.  https://partneredge.sap.com/en/library/education/psd/2025/jul/e_oe_te_w_PSD_WEB_00010668.html

#SAP #SAPBTP #SAPPartners #SAPEcosystem #AIML #DigitalTransformation #DataInnovation #SAPCommunity

entry.title: Re: Tweaks for RAP BO events addressing filtering (before send) and too small payload (callbacks nee
entry.content:
Hi @mlauber,

Thank you for the very informative blog post. I created a similar situation and custom event in relation to billing document created. I am raising this event in a local event class. I went through all of the steps with service binding and outbound binding config. However, I am only seeing the standard billing document created event in AEM. 
I know my custom event is being raised correctly, as I see it in the Display Business Event Log Fiori application. Any insight as to why we may not be seeing my custom event in AEM and only the standard event?

Thanks,
Jared

entry.title: Re: FSCM - Credit Limit Requests Approval using Manage Credit Management Rules
entry.content: In the Credit Limit Request app after clicking on the approve button initially the approver is seeing the limit approved as 0.00. Is this a standard behavior??

entry.title: SAP’s Most Popular Certification Gets a Major Upgrade
entry.content:
March is officially the month of ABAP. SAP’s most popular certification for back-end developers, the Back-End Developer ABAP Cloud exam, is getting a major upgrade. At the same time, the SAP Community developer challenge for ABAP is going live, making this the perfect moment to sharpen your skills and validate your expertise.

 

A Reimagined Certification Experience

The ABAP Cloud certification exam has been redesigned. Moving beyond traditional question-based formats, the new exam introduces a performance-based, open-book experience. Learners now work directly in authentic SAP systems, navigating AI-supported, real-world scenarios that reflect actual project work. The focus is no longer on memorization; it’s about demonstrating practical skills that matter on the job.

 

What Does It Mean for You?

If you’ve been preparing for certification through the SAP Learning site, you’re already familiar with hands-on exercises and scenario-based tasks embedded in the learning journeys. The new exam format simply extends that approach. From the moment you begin your certification, the experience feels familiar because it mirrors how you’ve been learning all along.

Every practical exam, whether system-based or scenario-driven reflects the reality of SAP projects:

  • Timeboxed tasks performed in live SAP systems
  • Realistic customer and project scenarios
  • AI-supported simulations
  • Open-book access to resources such as SAP Help Portal, SAP Learning, SAP Community, and SAP Joule for Consultants (where applicable)
  • A clear emphasis on proving your ability to do the work

This shift represents something bigger: trust. Trust in learners who invest in building real skills and trust from employers who rely on SAP-certified professionals to deliver value from day one.

 

How to Get Certified as Backend Developer for ABAP Cloud

Earning your certification is a structured journey. Whether you are new to ABAP or looking to formalize years of experience, the following resources will help you build a strong foundation and deepen your expertise.

 

Recommended Courses to Build and Deepen Your Skills

Start with the fundamentals and progressively expand your knowledge:

Course: Learning Basic ABAP Programming

Course: Deepening Your ABAP Programming Knowledge

Course: Building Data Models with the ABAP Dictionary and ABAP Core Data Services

Course: Practicing Clean Core Extensibility for SAP S/4HANA Cloud

SAP Certification: Backend Developer - ABAP Cloud

 

Together, these courses prepare you not just to pass the exam but to succeed in real-world ABAP Cloud development. Learn more about the exam details in this community blog by @JenniferHauck.

 

 

Connect Live with SAP Experts and Strengthen Your Exam Readiness

Learning doesn’t have to be a solo experience. If you’re looking for direct interaction, practical tips, and expert guidance, join the upcoming live sessions available through your SAP Learning Hub subscription:

  • Getting Started with ABAP Cloud Development
  • Get Certified: SAP Certified – Back-End Developer ABAP Cloud
  • Stay Certified: Back-End Developer – ABAP Cloud

These sessions offer the opportunity to clarify questions, reinforce key concepts, and gain confidence before taking the exam.

 

Experience Hands-On Learning at SAP CodeJam Events Near You

If you prefer immersive, in-person learning, don’t miss the upcoming SAP CodeJam events. These workshops are designed to provide practical, guided experience with real SAP technologies in a collaborative environment.

Upcoming sessions include:

  • April 7: ABAP AI: Capabilities in SAP Joule for Developers CodeJam (São Paulo, Brazil)
  • April 8: ABAP AI: Capabilities in SAP Joule for Developers CodeJam (Londrina, Brazil)
  • April 23: ABAP Cloud and the RESTful Application Programming Model (Warsaw, Poland)

These events are an excellent opportunity to deepen your understanding, expand your network, and gain hands-on practice. Be sure to explore the full event calendar regularly, as new sessions are added on an ongoing basis.

 

Continue Your Learning with On-Demand Developer Content

Can’t attend live? Explore past Devtoberfest sessions, Tech Bytes, SAP CodeTalks, and more on the official SAP Developers YouTube channel. On-demand content allows you to learn at your own pace while staying connected to the latest innovations in ABAP and SAP development.

March is the perfect time to invest in your ABAP Cloud journey. With a certification experience designed to reflect real project work, you’re not just passing an exam, you’re demonstrating that you’re ready to build, extend, and innovate in the SAP ecosystem.

entry.title: Re: The navigation information is not valid in sap fiori launchpad

entry.title: Re: Calibration process mapping in SAP
entry.content: Sorry Equipment category with "Q" please guide to Print the Certificate

entry.title: Streamlining Warehouse Operations: What's New in the Manage Outbound Warehouse Activities App
entry.content:
We are rolling out several updates to the Manage Outbound Warehouse Activities App that make daily tasks smoother and more intuitive. These enhancements reflect feedback from our users.  What has changed? 

 

 Streamlined Navigation and Filtering 

 Finding what you need is now easier with several navigation improvements: 

  • New "Open" Tab: Automatically filters the list report page to show only outbound warehouse requests with an "Open" lifecycle status 

 

  • Direct Stock Access: "Open Related" functionality now navigates directly to assigned stock in the Manage Stock app

 

  • Links: The product field now connects directly to the Display Products app 

 

Better Progress Tracking 

 We've completely redesigned how quantities are displayed to give you the full picture: 

  • Progress Overview: Now visible at both header and item levels directly in the object page 
  • Micro Process Flow: Quantities are now displayed in the micro process flow at the item level, making it easier to understand progress at a glance 

 

  • Improved Context: Previously, you only saw the quantity for the current activity, which would drop to zero once completed. Now you can track progress at any stage 

 

 Simplified and Reorganized Interface 

 The app now focuses specifically on outbound deliveries with a cleaner layout: 

  • Simplification: The Related Documents section has been removed from the header and item object page 
  • Reorganized Columns: The main page now highlights business partner links and progress overviews 
  • Restructured Object Page: Each request now displays the planned goods issue date and progress overview at the top, with a simplified item table below 

 

Want to learn more about SAP Logistics Management?

Explore the SAP Logistics Management Online Course 

Visit the SAP Logistics Management Product Page

entry.title: Notification for different country when Onboardee completes the Personal Data Collection
entry.content:
Dear Experts,
Following this procedure: https://help.sap.com/docs/successfactors-onboarding/implementing-onboarding/creating-business-rule-to-trigger-email-notification-when-personal-data-collection-step-is-completed?q=original+record&locale=en-US , I created a rule that alerts HR personnel involved in the onboarding process when the onboardee has finished providing their personal data. The rule worked as per the official procedure, but stopped working when I divided it by country as shown in the attached screenshot:

Could you please help me?
Thank you very much in advance.

entry.title: Re: rating gap analysis layout
entry.content:
Hi @user116 

The gap graph that you see on the screenshot corresponds to the legacy experience for Performance Management forms for an EZ-Rater section with the show-gap="true", whereas the other screenshot is the latest experience, where the rating gaps display as numeric on the side-by-side and no longer as a graph. You can hide with show-gap="false".

More information is available here: 

https://help.sap.com/docs/successfactors-performance-and-goals/implementing-and-managing-performance-management/understanding-rating-gaps-in-latest-form-experience

https://help.sap.com/docs/successfactors-performance-and-goals/implementing-and-managing-performance-management/ez-rater-latest-form-experience

Hope this will help, 

Regards, 

Jordi

entry.title: Re: Action Required: Update your certificate trust stores for enhanced SAP HANA Cloud security
entry.content: Does the presence of newer DigiCert root certificates—specifically “DigiCert RSA4096 Root G5” and “DigiCert TLS ECC P384 Root G5”—remove the requirement to trust the older DigiCert G2 chain, or do receiving systems still need to import the new SAP Cloud Root CA regardless of any existing DigiCert G5 certificates?

entry.title: Lock Parent vs Leaf Members
entry.content:
Hi all,

I would like to ask whether the following is possible in SAC.

In my data model, I have a hierarchy within a generic dimension. In a table, I would like to lock only the parent member, while keeping all underlying child members open for input.

Is there a way to achieve this other than creating a styling rule?

entry.title: Missing Depreciation Area in Asset Master despite Company Code Configuration
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I am facing an issue in SAP S/4HANA Cloud regarding Asset Accounting configuration and would appreciate some guidance. I am seeing a discrepancy between the depreciation areas configured for a Company Code and the ones that actually appear on the Asset Master data.

The Scenario:

Company Code:  US company code

Asset Class: 1100 (Buildings)

The Issue:
I noticed that Depreciation Area 16 is missing for the US companies.

When I check the configuration app "Define Depreciation Areas in Company Code" for Company Code US, I clearly see that Depreciation Area 16 (Customer-specific use / Ledger 2L) is configured and present.

However, when I go to the "Manage Fixed Assets" app and look at a test asset (Asset Class 1100) created in the exact same Company Code , Depreciation Area 16 is completely missing from the Valuation tab. (I only see areas 1, 32, 90, 91, 92, and 93).

My Question:
Why would a depreciation area be visible in the Company Code configuration but not show up on the actual asset master record?

Is there a secondary configuration step at the Asset Class level (e.g., a "Deactivate" flag for specific areas within Asset Class 1100) that I need to check in S/4HANA Cloud? If so, which specific SSCUI / Configuration Activity should I look at to enable Area 16 for these assets?

Thank you in advance for your help!

entry.title: Re: Q&A section to have Public Cloud or Private Cloud option to choose
entry.content: I meant on-premise versus private cloud.

entry.title: SAP DM - not able to create structure map global variable
entry.content:
Hi Team,

we are trying to use structure map data type in global variable. we have defined the variable and also trying to write value into it while trying to write, we are facing two issues as follows:

  • not able to use any data type to write into the global variable because structure map data type is only supported with global variable.
  • not able to write the value dynamically, as per the SAP note #3379404 we want to write the map-type variable, but its not supported. we are running on 2.6.4 production connector version.

can you please help us to rectify these issues as we are unable to create structuremap  in SAP DM using global variable. 

 

Any help will be appreciated.

Regards,
Ankit Gupta

entry.title: if any method we can avoid to using PMP0 as the actual cost of expense item of service order
entry.content:
Dear expert, 

Seems like PMP0 on expense line item of service confirmation is entry G/L as the actual cost,  if this setting can be changed, any BAPI can be used please. Thanks a lo.t

entry.title: Re: Set up the Basic Trial account enabled with Joule for Developers
entry.content: ZAC_205122

entry.title: Re: Instructor Led items not triggering Surveys
entry.content:
Hi @ThaboMaroga,

There could be multiple reasons for the surveys not getting triggered.

  • The Survey associated to the item is not published & is still in draft state.
  • Required for Item Completion at the Survey level is not enabled
  • Required for Item Completion at the Item level is not enabled
  • The necessary settings are not enabled for the Completion Status to trigger the survey

You can refer to the below KBA's that can help you investigate further.

2523676 - Survey is not Assigned to Users after Course Completion

2318365 - Survey is not triggered after completing an Item

entry.title: Re: Exploring CPI Message Store & MPL Made Easy: Introducing My Open Source Viewer
entry.content:
Hello BinlaThipsukhum,

I deployed this app to our BTP and tried to run. 
It runs fine when we open list report. But when we try ti navigate to Object page we are getting this error 
"{"error":{"code":"500","message":"Typed VDM READ failed: The HTTP response code (403) indicates an error. The OData service responded with an error message."}}".Is this a role issue?

entry.title: Re: Item showing in Chinese instead of English
entry.content: In order for the item titles to be displayed correctly in the user preferred language you must make sure that the title is correctly maintained for the item in that locale. You can click on globe icon and see in which locales the Item titles are populated from the learning admin side. So, please make sure that the title is populated for the item in the users preferred locale.

entry.title: Re: Receive Events from Event Mesh of Integration Suite to CAP Node.js Applications
entry.content:
Hi qiangwan87,

Thanks for your reply!

While considering the migration to Advanced Event Mesh (AEM), I have a concern regarding our CAP applications. Based on the documentation (https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/node.js/messaging#advanced-event-mesh), it appears that the libraries for communicating with AEM are currently still in beta.

Ideally, it would be perfect if we could keep using our current @sap/xb-msg-amqp-v100 library to avoid introducing any risks. If that is possible, we would simply need to remove the connection to the second Event Mesh instance and we would be all set.

Could you confirm if this approach is feasible?

Best regards,

Andrea

entry.title: Ensuring a Smooth SAP Datasphere Deployment: The Value of Continuous Quality Checks
entry.content:
As your organisation prepares to adopt SAP Datasphere, the comprehensive data fabric solution as part of SAP Business Data Cloud, it is always recommended to carefully plan configuration and optimization to deliver its full potential. Often the complexity of initial deployment can prove challenging, even for experienced IT teams. This is where SAP's Continuous Quality Check (CQC) for Deployment Readiness becomes a strategic asset.

The SAP Foundational Success Plan, as part of SAP's Services and Support portfolio, provides essential onboarding, technical cloud operations and preventive support included with every cloud solution from SAP. Our SAP Enterprise Support service and support offerings are built into the solution subscription at no additional cost. 
Continuous Quality Check (CQC) services are a key part of this offering.


Proactive Risk Mitigation

The CQC for SAP Datasphere Deployment Readiness is designed to identify potential issues before they impact your production environment. By conducting a thorough review of your tenant configuration SAP experts can flag concerns that might otherwise surface only after go-live, when remediation becomes significantly more costly and disruptive. These checks include:

  • Data Provisioning Agent setup,
  • Space management,
  • Data replication processes
  • Details of underlying SAP HANA Cloud database metrics
  • and more...


Alignment with Best Practices

One of the service's core strengths is its foundation in SAP best practices. The pre-defined scope and checks ensure consistency and comprehensiveness, covering critical areas that directly impact system adoption and reliability. This structured approach means you benefit from SAP's accumulated expertise across numerous customer implementations, rather than learning through trial and error.
This CQC service is most valuable when you need a holistic baseline assessment before business go-live. It's not intended for troubleshooting specific business process issues or as a substitute for design consulting.

Timing and Preparation

SAP recommends requesting this service six weeks before your planned go-live date, allowing adequate time for review and implementation of recommendations. This timeline reflects the reality that meaningful improvements require both technical implementation and validation. 

The service can be requested through the Get Support application in SAP for Me.
For more details please check out the service infosheet: Continuous Quality Check Overview ➡️  Data & AI

For organizations preparing to deploy SAP Datasphere as part of SAP Business Data Cloud, this CQC service can ensure alignment to SAP best practices and accelerate time-to-value for your data management initiative and deployment success.


GET MORE CONTENT LIKE THIS!

SAP Enterprise Support Value Maps — your go-to team for foundational support and empowerment — have officially moved to a dedicated SAP Community Group.

As part of your SAP cloud subscription, you get access to:

  • Expert-led resources
  • Tailored recommendations
  • Advisory services
  • …all designed to help you accelerate innovation and success.

👉 Visit our Community Group
Sign in with your S-user ID or Universal ID, then hit “Subscribe” to stay updated.

Looking to dive deeper into data-driven innovation?
Within the group, explore the Data & Analytics Value Map to connect with your Foundational Support team. Simply click “Join Group”, and once inside, you can even request a call with a topic expert to get personalized guidance and enablement support.

 

 

 

 

 

 

Quicklinks

  • SAP Business Data Cloud : Expert-Guided Implementation series
  • SAP Enterprise Support Value Maps - Community Group
  • SAP Enterprise Support - Guided Learning

entry.title: Can you share an xsuaa service accross different spaces and or subaccounts?
entry.content:
Hi,

Is it possible to share an xsuaa service accross spaces and/or subaccounts? I have a use case where an application (in space A) may have to contact backend(s) that reside in different spaces (B, C) (and likely different subaccounts). In this scenario, JWT generated in space A will not be valid in B or C.

Is there an approach for this? xsuaa service does not allow cloud foundry sharing.

entry.title: Parent–Child Material Sales Scenario for MTS (Make-to-Stock)
entry.content:
Hello,

Please check the below requirement SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud

Requirement: Parent–Child Material Sales Scenario for MTS (Make-to-Stock)

  1. Sales orders are received from the Partner Portal using the parent material code.
  2. The system should automatically convert the parent material code into the corresponding child material codes.
  3. Only child material codes should appear in the sales orders based on stock availability.
  4. If one child material is out of stock, the system should automatically select another child material with sufficient stock.

    Regards,

    Ashish

entry.title: Re: Transitioning from Chaos to Clarity: Converting Raw Design Worksheet XML to Excel
entry.content:
Hi @luckyra17 if your company allows it you can also use GenAI to generate the same but directly in the format of the official Compensation workbooks template. https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blog-posts-by-sap/prompt-to-automate-design-worksheet-tabs-of-the-compensation-module/ba-p/14307650 

Best thing would be to have an excel Macro where you can just load the XML in one tab, run the macro and get it all in the Compensation workbook format. So that even people who cannot use or don't want to use GenAI can run it quickly. Will give it a shot a bit later this year.

entry.title: Re: UI5con Bengaluru 2026 - Community, Code, and the Future of SAP UI Development
entry.content: Is there any github repo or documentation on the DataRepository library topic ?

entry.title: Project Replication Between SAP Project and Resource Management and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Introduction 

In today’s connected enterprise landscape, seamless integration between project management and resource management systems is crucial for operational efficiency. The integration between SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and SAP Resource Management (SPRM-RM) enables organizations to synchronize project and staffing data, ensuring consistent project visibility and effective staffing decisions. 

This blog explores the Project Replication process, configuration steps, and key features. It also highlights the newly-introduced Auto-Publish capability for both Professional Services (PS) and Enterprise Projects.


Prerequisite 
You must have the 6JO scope item activated.

Understanding Project Replication 

Project Replication allows project-related data from SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition to be shared with Resource Management (RM). Once connected, Resource Management can be used to staff project demands originating from S/4HANA. 

Key Benefits 

  • Centralized staffing decisions across integrated systems 
  • Real-time synchronization of project demands and assignments 
  • Flexibility to handle both Professional Services and Enterprise Projects 

Before resource requests can be managed in SPRM-RM, project data must first be replicated from SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. 



Setting Up Communication Between S/4HANA and Resource Management 

The integration setup involves configuring secure communication channels between the two systems, as shown in this video:
Project Replication - SAP Media Share

Set Up Communication in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 
Establish communication arrangements to allow project data replication to Resource Management. 

Example: 

If you want projects created in S/4HANA Cloud to get replicated in SAP Resource Management, you create a Communication User named RM_COM_USER and a Communication Arrangement using scenario SAP_COM_0153 (Project Integration). 

This arrangement ensures: 

  • S/4HANA can expose project-related APIs (like Project Definition, WBS Elements) 
  • Resource Management can securely read project data whenever replication runs 

  

Set Up a Destination in SAP BTP Cockpit 
Create a destination in the SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) cockpit for communication from Resource Management to S/4HANA Cloud. This destination defines the connection endpoint and authentication for data exchange.  

Example: 

In SAP BTP Cockpit, you create a destination called S4HC_ProjectReplication with: 

  • URL: S/4HANA Cloud API endpoint  
  • Authentication: Basic Authentication using RM_COM_USER 
  • Additional Properties: 
  • sap-client=100 
  • trustAll=true (if using a test tenant) 

This destination allows Resource Management to call the S/4HANA APIs to fetch or update project information. 

 

Replicating Project Data 
 

  1. Replicating Professional Services Project Data 

Professional Services (PS) projects from S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition can be replicated to Resource Management. The replication includes project demands and related staffing details, depending on configuration. 
A Delta Replication feature is available, allowing only changed or new project data to be replicated. This ensures performance and data consistency. 

      2. Replicating Enterprise Project Data 

Similarly, Enterprise Project data can be replicated. You can define what aspects of project data are to be shared. The Delta Replication for Enterprise Projects ensures that updates or changes to existing projects are automatically synchronized without duplicating entire datasets. 

 
This video shows how you can replicate project data from SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition to Resource Management:  How to Replicate Project Data from SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition to Resource Management.

 

Auto-Publish Feature 

A major enhancement in recent releases is the Auto-Publish feature, now available for both Professional Services and Enterprise Projects. This feature simplifies the process of publishing project demands and staffing data in Resource Management. 
 
Automatic publishing of requests implies that project demands without corresponding staffing are replicated and published automatically. If project demands have their corresponding staffing from SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, they are also replicated and are automatically published in Resource Management.  
 
Note:  
An upgrade to cost center ODM version 3.7.0 or higher is mandatory for replicating project demands with corresponding staffing or assignments. 
If the ODM version is below 3.7.0, replication of demands with assignments will fail, regardless of whether Automatic Publishing of Requests is turned ON or OFF. This is because, for demands with assignments, the resource organization of the resulting resource request must be derived from the cost center of the assigned persons. This derivation requires the cost center ODM version 3.7.0 or higher (to be maintained in distribution model in BDO for both PUSH and PULL) to function correctly.   
 

  1. Auto-Publish for Enterprise Projects 

When Automatic Publishing of Requests is turned on: 

  • Even if a project demand has no staffing, it’s still replicated and published automatically. 
  • Both project demands and corresponding staffing from S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition are replicated and automatically published in Resource Management.  
     

When Automatic Publishing is turned off: 

  • Unassigned demands require manual publishing in Resource Management 
  • Project demands and their staffing from S/4HANA are replicated. 
  • - In case of Enterprise Projects, project demand with staffing data/staffed resources are still published automatically to keep the staffing picture accurate in Resource Management. 
    - In case of Professional Services projects, only the demand gets replicated without staffing (which gets replicated in the next delta build) 
     
  •  If you manually publish a resource request, then the following scenarios apply: 
    - In case of Enterprise Projects, in the next delta cycle, both the project demand and the staffing get automatically published. 
    - In case of Professional Services projects, the project demand gets replicated without the staffing (and the latter gets replicated in the next delta build). 
     
  • IMPORTANT: If Auto-Publish is enabled later, previously replicated resource requests (from when it was off) still require manual publishing.  
     
    Prerequisite 
    You must maintain availability data. Also, ensure that master data is up to date. 

 
 
       2. Auto-Publish for Professional Services Projects 

When Automatic Publishing of Requests is enabled: 

  • Both project demands and corresponding staffing from S/4HANA are replicated and automatically published in Resource Management. 
  • Assignments are automatically visible without manual intervention. 
     
    To publish the request, it is mandatory to fill in the Resource Organization field. If a service organization exists in S/4HANA but is not mapped to a corresponding resource organization in Resource Management, the demand will be replicated but will remain unpublished. You can publish it manually later. 
     
     

When Automatic Publishing is disabled: 

  • Only project demands are replicated (without staffing). 
  • Resource requests appear without assignments and must be manually published in Resource Management before assignments can be reflected. 
  • Any previously replicated requests need to be manually published, even after enabling Auto-Publish. 

 

Key Advantages of Auto-Publish 

  • Automation: Eliminates manual publishing tasks for project demands and assignments. 
  • Speed: Enables real-time availability of demands for staffing actions. 
  • Accuracy: Ensures that project staffing data is always in sync between S/4HANA and SPRM-RM. 
  • Flexibility: Allows organizations to choose between manual control and full automation, depending on project governance requirements. 

 
Therefore, the new Auto-Publish feature significantly reduces manual effort, ensures alignment between systems, and accelerates staffing visibility for both Professional Services and Enterprise Projects. 
 
Conclusion 

Project Replication between SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and SAP Resource Management (SPRM-RM) provides a unified framework for project staffing and demand visibility. Through robust data replication capabilities covering both Professional Services and Enterprise Projects and enhancements like Delta Replication and Auto-Publish, SAP empowers project-driven businesses to achieve: 

  • Faster synchronization 
  • Reduced administrative overhead 
  • Improved collaboration between project and resource managers 

With these capabilities, enterprises can ensure that project demands, staffing data, and resource availability remain aligned across systems. This enables smarter decisions and optimized resource utilization.

entry.title: Re: An AI Tool That Turns SuccessFactors $metadata Into a Clean Excel Data Dictionary in 30 Secs
entry.content: Love this, the dev–prod drift comparison is especially valuable for catching missing transports and compliance issues early; just be mindful of client/security rules before uploading metadata to an external AI tool.

entry.content: Thanks @Andrii for the help, I did reinstall latest version of eclipse and ADT, now I could create the package. Thanks much! Thank @M-K I tried after a day, so the issue was with ADT version primarily.

entry.title: Converting to the 3-System Landscape – Part 5: Microlearning Videos
entry.content:
Co-Author: Dennis Leslie, Kate Wilson

Are you considering a move to the SAP Central Business Configuration–based SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, 3‑system landscape – but still unsure what to expect or how to get oriented? Good news: the following microlearning videos are available at no cost to guide you through the essentials.

  • Managing Transports in SAP S/4HANA Cloud 3-System Landscape
    Microlearning video

     

    This video explains how different types of data are transported from the development system to the test and production systems. It outlines a structured and streamlined transport process designed to minimize risk within the 3‑system landscape.

  • Exploring the Test Automation Tool in SAP S/4HANA Cloud 3-System Landscape
    Microlearning video
    This video highlights the features of the test automation tool for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. The tool simplifies business process testing after release upgrades and is most effective in the 3-system landscape.

  • Navigating Parallel Line in SAP S/4HANA Cloud 3-System Landscape
    Microlearning video
    This video explains the parallel line feature. A parallel line is created as a copy of your main line and provides an additional SAP Central Business Configuration workspace, along with an extra development and test tenant for various use cases. This no‑cost feature is exclusive to the 3‑system landscape.

  • Exploring Developer Extensibility in SAP S/4HANA Cloud 3-System Landscape
    Microlearning video
    This video highlights the three types of extensibility – key user, developer, and side‑by‑side. While key user and side‑by‑side extensibility are available in both 2‑ and 3‑system landscapes, developer extensibility is exclusive to the 3‑system landscape. Developer extensibility allows you to create customer‑specific extensions to released SAP objects using ABAP, enabling a deeper level of customization.

  • Using the Configuration Localization Tool in SAP S/4HANA Cloud 3-System Landscape
    Microlearning video
    This video explains the features of the Configuration Localization Tool, which enables the creation of customer‑specific countries by localizing business configuration and is available exclusively in the 3‑system landscape.

Explore the power of the 3-system landscape today! To learn more, check out the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, 3-System Landscape page on SAP Community.

If you liked this blog, please leave us a thumbs up at the top. Also, make sure to follow the SAP Central Business Configuration tag or follow this dedicated blog collection to stay up to date with the latest blog posts.

entry.title: Hello SAP Comunity!!
entry.content:
I'am GURRAM DHANUNJAYA REDDY currently working in the Production & Planning domain with hands-on exposure to SAP processes. My journey with SAP has been an exciting blend of learning, real-time scenarios, and continuous improvement.
Recently, I had the wonderful opportunity to attend SAP TechEd in Bengaluru, where I completed a certification in Generative AI. This experience expanded my perspective on how AI can transform business processes — especially in planning, optimization, and intelligent decision-making within SAP.
I’m here to learn, contribute, and connect with fellow SAP professionals. Looking forward to engaging discussions and collaborative growth!

#SAPCommunity #SAPPP #GenerativeAI #SAPTechEd #LearningJourney

entry.title: Hello SAP Community
entry.content: I am Sandireddy Lakshmi Triveni pursuing B.Tech Final year at Chalapathi Institute of Engineering and Technology .I am someone who loves reading books ,working with others, exchanging ideas, and building something meaningful together .I’ve also earned certifications like SAP Certified Associate – Implementation Consultant (End-to-End Business Processes for the Intelligent Enterprise) and Generative AI Developer that shape my professional path. I am eagerly waiting to connect with all the community members.

entry.title: Re: Long Text Template Extensibility for Maintenance Request
entry.content:
Useful but we get complaints of users the 1333 limit is causing friction. 2 questions 

- can sap increase 1333 to 2500 or so?

- to avoid putting useful data in long text which is difficult to leverage later. Options available to adjust create maint notification screen with Extensibility to add some reoccuring checklist items?

entry.title: Re: Cancel OnboardingError : [COE0018] The cancellation request for new hire xxx has failed. Please
entry.content:
Good post.
Just by reading this, I was able to identify a much simpler cause that occurs very often. In many cases, the error is caused by attempting to cancel a process more than 30 days after the Hire Date, which makes it impossible for the system to register a "No Show".

entry.title: How show with graphical flag new sales order demand in PPDS Gannt chart
entry.content:
We have got a question from our users if it is possible to show a flag - like star or similar all new demand from new sales order lines, which have not yet been planned in the Gannt chart. Is there someone which have tried to built a Gannt chart graphical profile with an object, which identifies new planned orders?
The idea behind it - is that our planners would like to check the new planned orders if they should stay in the default assigned block/place in the schedule, or if there is a better time slot, where these can be placed.
So by make it graphical visible - then planners can quickly identify which workcenter they should focus on.

entry.title: Re: Facing the issue while trying to do the full load for...
entry.content: Hi MohanSai_Gorantla, in the ODP framework a full load can only be executed once per subscription as Iknow. If the package was already extracted, the system prevents another full load for the same active subscription. If resetting the subscription does not work, the standard approach is to end the existing subscription in ODQMON and trigger a new initialization from the BW side, which will create a new subscription.

entry.title: Re: EWM SMQ2-Command to tRFC/qRFC: Execute LUW again. for outbound delivery
entry.content: but what is the reason behind the queue is getting stuck ??

entry.title: Re: CX Onboarding: How to Prevent and Manage Project Risks Using SAP Best Practices
entry.content:
This is very important. When we start a project with a customer, several situations can lead to project failure. When we understand these potential issues in advance, we can better prepare the team and the project.

Great post, thank you!

entry.title: Foreign exchange gain/loss incorrect
entry.content:
Hi there,

We have an invoice journal posting that has a foreign gain/loss which is a signification amount and doesnt match with the exchange rate.

The absolute exchange rate in the clearing journal is 1.15808, which is our valid exchange rate at the time of posting. However the gain/loss equates to 1.11607 which is an exchange rate that was valid many months prior. How and why would it have an absolute exchange rate in the journal but then use an older rate as the profit/loss?

For context we dont do too many overseas payments so exchange rates are only updated about once a month when needed. Also the bank item postings all had the correct rate, it just seems to be the invoice journal clearing that caused the gain/loss.

entry.title: Re: Maintenance Order: Determine the delivery address for external operations
entry.content:
Hi Anika, sorry for the late reply.

This functionality is pretty good and very usable. Some feedback below

There is an issue when we select the Technical Object address and use it once. Since the address cannot be deleted from the technical object. This is needed if we want to revert back to a different way of address use. 

Secondly from the English documentation it is a bit unclear what these Ordering Party and Goods Recipient are. It seems they are commercially related Partners (after logging in in German you can see it).

Regards,

entry.title: sp_iqindexinfo assertions
entry.content:
I would like to seek your guidance regarding the behavior of sp_iqindexinfo following recent changes in the dev branch.
On the dev branch, IQ_SYSTEM_TEMP is no longer returned from SYSIQDBFILE (change 7033387). After this change, I am encountering dbtest assertion failures related to DBSpPct while running cn_partition.tst.
Observed behavior:
Dev branch
• SYSIQDBFILE contains dbspace 16388 but no entry for 16385
• sp_iqclouddbspace() returns:
  • iqcn_user
  • IQ_SYSTEM_TEMP (HDLFS path present)
Master branch
• SYSIQDBFILE includes dbspace 16385
• sp_iqclouddbspace() returns only iqcn_user
Following this change, dbtest assertions from sp_iqindexinfo are failing, for example:
• DBSpPct for DBA.pt1dbsp9 = 20 (expected ≤ 19)
• DBSpPct for DBA.pt1.C2_FPdbsp4 = 36 (expected ≤ 30)
Based on my understanding:
• DBSpBlks represents total capacity in blocks
• IQ_SYSTEM_TEMP is managed separately in Cloud and its entry was removed from SYSIQDBFILE
• If TEMP capacity is not included in the denominator, DBSpBlks becomes smaller
• A smaller denominator results in a higher percentage, leading to assertion failures
I also reviewed change 5396042 but I was unable to clearly understand how DBSpPct limits are derived, particularly when IsDataLakeTest is true versus false.
Please provide your guidance on the following:
  1. Should sp_iqindexinfo be adjusted to handle the absence of IQ_SYSTEM_TEMP in SYSIQDBFILE?
  2. Are the dbtest DBSpPct limits expected to change due to this behavior?
  3. What would be the recommended approach to debug this assertion?

entry.title: Re: MPH Duplicate Records

They provided this KBA-3614135 - Duplicate Record Error received when we submit MPH - Onboarding . They are saying they will fix this issue in 1H 2026 release. As of now ,we dont have any solution. Would be great anyone provided a solution on this.

entry.title: Re: Enhancements in EBS - BADI FIEB_CHANGE_BS_DATA
entry.content:
Hello @Bohdan 

i have a case with our EBS,  so we use algorithm 015 for clearing and treatment type with assgnement field. 

We have an issue with our EBS statements.

We use algorithm 015 with the assignement (ZUONR) field for clearing. When I have a item-to-itme transaction, everything is OK; the posting is done correctly.

When the total of the open items in finance matches the amount in the EBS, the program clears correctly.

Our problem is when I have several open items that don't total the amount from the EBS statement (even though they have the same ZUONR). The program/algorithm is unable to clear the transaction.

Which algorithm would you recommend to use an additional criterion (assignement and amount)?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Warranty Claim Management - Customer Claim Processing in S/4HANA Cloud ERP, Public Edition
entry.content:
Dear Qi Liu.

Thank you for the detailed explanation of the claim process 63Y in S/4HANA Cloud ERP, along with the screenshots. The information is very helpful and informative.

Could you please clarify the following questions for S/4HANA Cloud, Edition 2502?

  1. Is it possible to configure a custom additional action under “Process Action,” along with an additional processing status?

  2. Under “Maintain Claim Rule,” can an additional custom rule or validation be configured (e.g., Z_CHECK rule)? Please confirm.

  3. Which additional object types are supported (for example, VELO, IBASE, SERN)?

  4. Are object types available & supported at a specific item level?

  5. Does the “Initiate Supplier Process” button support triggering a supplier claim with a new claim version that is linked to the original customer claim?

  6. Also, is there a dedicated processing status for the supplier version of the claim ?

Thank you in advance for your clarification.

entry.title: Position Management Dynamic Workflow Story Report
entry.content:
Hi - We currently have a dynamic workflow set up for position management approvals. I am trying to create a story report to show who position management workflows are sitting with. I am unable to pull in the current approver into my story report. The report will only show me originator and last approver. How can I include current approver in my story report? 

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central

entry.title: Peppol Exchange - Push the response to the Souce system delays
entry.content:
Good afternoon. We are currently in the process to test the newly implemented DRC from SAP ERP 740 using Cloud Connector to BTP Cloud and we are having issues to receive the results after the invoice is sent to Peppol Exchange. We are seeing delays over 2 days and it has been difficulty to troubleshoot the errors. I followed the steps listed on this link : https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-edition/sap-document-and-reporting-compliance-cloud-edition/integrating-peppol-exchange-with-sap-erp and checked all settings with company assisting us to implement DRC for Belgium. Please let me know if there is any blog related to this issue or SAP notes to check. I already reviewed these notes and did not resolve this issue: 

2926868 - eDocument Peppol Troubleshooting Guide, 3498170 - Troubleshooting guide: Electronic communication integration of SAP Document 

Any assistance or guidance is really appreciated.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM and Tricentis A Step-by-Step Integration Guide
entry.content:
I have Tosca ALM integrated; Auth happens at IAS with Trust relation to my Org IDP

For Tosca-to-SAP Cloud ALM integration, which identity is used at runtime (human user vs OAuth client), and where exactly are its permissions defined and logged?

The logged in Tosca User permissions, and ALM Role Collection how they work together

entry.title: Re: Notification for different country when Onboardee com...
entry.content:
Hi @veronica_pilato59650f ,

The likely reason is that the user’s Job Information is currently null (since no job info data has been stored yet). Please run a rule trace if possible that should help to confirm the issue.

Other options to consider:

  1. Use the manager’s country, if it will always match the new hire’s country (Process.Manager.Job Information.Country).
  2. Use the company from the process trigger (Process.Process Trigger.Company). Note that here it stores the legal entity’s internal ID, not the external code. You can find the internal ID in the browser URL when opening the Legal Entity in Manage Data; it will appear as something like 'LegalEntity&i=xxxxxx', where xxxxxx is the code that you need to use in the rule.

Regards,

VR

entry.title: Re: Will blending data in a table be available for story...
entry.content: Hi @benroberg Are you able to confirm if the use of data blending will allow field from an LMS query and an EC query to be joined? (Provided there is a link such as employee ID)

entry.title: Employee Replication from ADP to SAP
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have a quick question regarding employee replication from ADP to SAP.

Other than using the HRMD_A IDoc, is there any alternative standard approach available for replicating employees from ADP to SAP? I checked the SAP Business API Hub, but I could not find any relevant APIs for this purpose.

Is there any other standard or API-based approach that can be used to achieve this integration without using SuccessFactors?

Please let me know if there are any recommended options.

Regards,
Guru

entry.title: Reset WT to zero in junuary
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
i’m a junior SAP Payroll consultant and I would really appreciate your guidance (this is actually my first PCR 😊)
i need to create a PCR for wage type 3080, which should be:
> The cumulative sum of wage type 3025
>accumulated starting from January (Year-To-Date)
>Reset automatically to 0 in January of the new year.

currently, wage type 3025 is already cumulated in the CRT table,In my PCR for 3080, I tried using the cumulated value of 3025 to build 3080 using AMT+C 3025

I THINK MY PCR IS NOT CORRECT AND I DON'T KNOW HOW TO FIX IT 🤕

entry.title: Re: Can you share an xsuaa service accross different spac...
entry.content:
https://help.sap.com/docs/connectivity/sap-btp-connectivity-cf/user-propagation-between-cloud-foundry-applications

 

Hope this helps!

entry.title: Re: Can you share an xsuaa service accross different spac...
entry.content: Also, found this - https://github.com/SAP-samples/btp-cap-multitenant-saas/blob/main/docu/2-basic/7-explore-the-components/components/Multitenancy.md

entry.title: Re: Can you share an xsuaa service accross different spac...
entry.content:
Authorization & Trust management service - shared tenant-mode

The tenant-mode shared allows you to share a UAA service instance of type application in a multitenant scenario. This is a central requirement of a multitenant application, as otherwise a separate UAA service instance would be required in each and every Consumer Subaccount. As all Tenants share the same XSUAA instance and only the authentication is delegated to the respective Tenant identity zone, this is a great process simplification.

entry.title: Why Generative UI is Redefining the Future of Enterprise Software
entry.content:
The world of user interfaces is evolving rapidly, spurred by the rise of consumer AI and shifting expectations for business software. Employees want the same intuitive and conversational experiences they enjoy at home to be reflected in their workplace tools. While text-based interactions are flexible and user-friendly, they struggle with structured data. Graphical user interfaces (GUIs) excel in presenting structured information, but they are rigid and costly to customize.

Enter generative UI: the game-changing solution bridging text and GUI. Generative UI allows software interfaces to dynamically adapt to each user’s intent, context, and task. By leveraging SAP Joule and Joule Agents, these interfaces materialize on demand, grounded in real-time, accurate data, while enabling seamless execution of complex workflows.

Generative UI is the future of enterprise software. It’s not just about dashboards—it’s about interfaces that empower users to make decisions and drive action with precision and confidence.

Read the full blog to learn how generative UI is redefining business applications.

entry.title: Re: Adding HANA DB in cloud ALM
entry.content:
3451241 - Add SAP HANA Cloud system with XS advanced and streaming analytics to SAP Cloud ALM.

https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-alm/setup-administration/sap-hana-cloud-sap-hana-database

 

Prerequisites

For Configuration and Security Analysis

  • You have a subscription for SAP HANA Cloud.

  • The information for your system or service has been imported to the Landscape Management app in SAP Cloud ALM. This happens daily with an automatic landscape import job. After subscribing to SAP Cloud ALM, you need to wait up to 24 hours for the job to run, for the first time.

For Health Monitoring:

  • You have access to the SAP BTP Cockpit.

  • Your user in SAP BTP Cockpit needs to be a member with the space role Space Developer for the space where you want to create the SAP HANA Cloud database instance.

Setup in SAP HANA Cloud

To set up Health Monitoring for SAP HANA Cloud, you need to create a service key. This isn't required to set up Configuration and Security Analysis.

To enable OAuth authentication between SAP Cloud ALM and SAP HANA Cloud, create a service key for the SAP HANA Cloud instance. If there's already an existing service key, you can use this service key for the connection with SAP Cloud ALM.

  1. In the SAP BTP Cockpit, access the sub-account used for SAP HANA Cloud.

  2. Choose Instances and Subscriptions.

  3. Find the instance with the service SAP HANA Cloud and choose hana for the database instance that you want to connect. Select the row of the instance.

  4. Go to the Service Keys tab.

  5. Choose Create.

  6. Enter a name for the service key.

  7. Choose Create.

Setup in SAP Cloud ALM

For Configuration and Security Analysis, there's no additional setup needed in SAP HANA Cloud.

The integration between SAP Cloud ALM and many SAP cloud services is orchestrated by SAP-Managed Connectivity.

SAP-managed connectivity uses SAP's infrastructure for OpenTelemetry-based data collection to report monitoring data to SAP Cloud ALM.

To activate the data collection, activate the monitoring in the respective SAP Cloud ALM monitoring app. By activating the data collection, you also give consent for the data exchange.

For details, check the documentation for the supported use cases:

To set up Health Monitoring, you need to create an endpoint in SAP Cloud ALM.

For Health Monitoring: Create an HTTP Endpoint

Before starting the setup, ensure that the information for your SAP HANA Cloud database has been imported from the System Landscape Information Service (SLIS) into the Landscape Management of SAP Cloud ALM.

  1. Open the Landscape Management app from the launchpad and select your service under Services & Systems.

  2. Choose the service name or choose  (Navigation) at the end of the row.

  3. On the Endpoints tab, choose Add to create a new endpoint.

  4. Enter a description.

  5. Choose the use-case you want to use in SAP Cloud ALM, for example Health Monitoring.

  6. Overwrite the value in the field Root URL as follows:

    Find the parameter host in the service key.

    Replace the part <hostname>.hana with api.gateway.orchestration.

    Example: Host 1ab123a4-1234-12b3-a123-1d234e567890.hana.trial-us10.hanacloud.ondemand.com is changed to Root URL https://api.gateway.orchestration.trial-us10.hanacloud.ondemand.com.

  7. Choose OAuth2ClientCredentials. Enter the following values from the SAP HANA Cloud service key. You can also copy the entire service key to the clipboard and use the Paste Service Key function.

    1. Client ID: clientid

    2. Client Secret: clientsecret

    3. Token Service URL: tokenurl extended by /oauth/token

  8. Save your endpoint.

Activate the Service in the Monitoring Apps

For Configuration and Security Analysis:

 

For Health Monitoring:

  • After creating the endpoint in SAP Cloud ALM, go to the Health Monitoring app and include SAP HANA Cloud in the scope.

3635636 - Error creating Endpoint for SAP HANA Cloud Database in Cloud ALM Landscape Management

entry.title: Change to company email
entry.content:
Hello SAP Support,

We have a employee S-User, some time ago this user use a personal email.

Now, I need to change for our company email. 

It is possible to change the correct organization email??


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Change to company email
entry.content:
Hello customer,

If you would like to change the S-user email address, could you pls kindly refer to the detailed steps documented in KBA 3108466 - How to update the email address for S-user IDs - SAP for Me and change the email address for the user on your side?

Thanks and regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Can't edit Open Deals in SAP for Me
entry.content:
I've been asked to edit the SAP for Me open deals for NDBS. Me and the admin for our company Dimitri have tried to copy the permissioing over from other accounts that I know can edit deals, but it still won't let me edit them. 


--- Steps to Reproduce ---

Give me the same access as others who can edit Open Deals in SAP for Me



--- Support Assistant ---
Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: Super, Cloud, and User Adminstrators

Q: Which S-user is having issue now?
A: Me
Q: What's the detailed issue with the above mentioned S-user?
A: S-user authorization issue

--- Issue Date (UTC) ---
DIGITS-02-25 23:35:48 - DIGITS-03-04 23:35:48

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Can't edit Open Deals in SAP for Me
entry.content:
Based your description, I understand you have issue with editing open deals in Deal Execution card in SAP for Me.

As you can see in the attachment, the required authorization to edit this card is "Partner - End Customer Sales & Adoption ".

Unfortunately, we here at SAP Support do not have relevant authorization to support SAP for Me Partner Dashboards or any of the related partner cards.

The authorizations required for Partner Dashboards are different than Customer Dashboards.

In order to get the full benefits of SAP for Me, ensure that you contact your Partner User Administrator (previously called Partner Security Manager) to provide you with the permissions you need for your specific role.

If you do not know who is your Partner User Administrator, just check SAP for Me > My Important Contacts 

To get further help, you may refer to the attachment to use get support channel to contact the responsible partner support team.

Please also see this KBA for more info:

3165784 - How to get assistance for Partner Dashboards and the related partner cards - SAP for Me

entry.title: Remove 2FA from S-user -
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Are you able to remove the 2FA  from  S-user account?
We recently had a technology uplift here at OT and received new devices. PERSON_NAME's 2FA was connected to his old device which he no longer has access to. Can you please assist with this?




------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Remove 2FA from S-user -
entry.content:
Regarding to your issue that two-factor authenticator, please kindly note that

S-users can (de-)activate TFA only by themselves via the following URL:

https://accounts.sap.com/ui/protected/profilemanagement

If you have any other issue about TFA or MFA, please kindly send this case back to me then I will involve our next support level to help you.

entry.title: Re: Understanding how to retrieve only the right employee records in Variable Pay
entry.content: Xavier. Thank you for your easy explanation. I've been finding your YouTube channel and blog very helpful.

entry.title: UI Annotation for dynamic field label
entry.content:
Hi,

I have created a Fiori APP using ABAP RAP framework. I need to set the label text of an input field dynamically as the short text of the MIC maintained in the master. I have written the below code in Metadata Extension, but the text is not changing dynamically. The label is currently coming from the custom data element which the field is linked to. 

 

@ui:{ fieldGroup: [{ qualifier: 'tqQualityDetails' , position: 10 } ],

hidden: #(hideHectolitreWeight) }

@Consumption.dynamicLabel: {

label: '&1',

binding: [{

index: 1,

// parameter: '',

element: 'txtHectolitreWeight',

// replaceWith: #LOW,

format:#TEXT

// offset: 0,

// length: 40

}]

}

HectolitreWeight;

 

Any help in this regard would be very much helpful.

Thanks,

Vinod Iyer

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – Adding a GUI transaction to the launchpad in SAP S/4HANA 2023 or hig
entry.content:
Thanks Jocelyn for the steps.

Initially thought Fiori is like GUI, they way FIORI has transformed, this tool requires specialized skillset. Moving people from Z to standard is humungous task.

Your are doing great with right inputs at appropriate time. 

Cheers,

entry.title: Re: Week 1 : Set up the Basic Trial account enabled with Joule for Developers
entry.content: Package :  ZAC_1293437

entry.title: Standard Application Enhancement
entry.content: Are there other ways to enhance standard applications without changing its namespace and id aside from Key User Adaptation? I need to insert my custom code but as a requirement, the personalized views must remain so a new namespace and id for the app is not an option.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to reverse the change of the “Time‑Bas...
entry.content: Hi Lakshmipathi, Thank you so. much for your reply, it's happy to know the change of Time-Based Methods can be restored to the previous method. Thanks

entry.title: Re: Build custom Joule Agent to analyze blocked freight order in S/4HANA TM
entry.content: @DASARIVINAYPRAKASH : What I explained is not a standard TM feature, but possibility to develop your own use cases with the availble frameworks; and yes, you can build this features with 2025 private cloud version of TM(am not 100% sure the said CDS views are available in 2023 though)

entry.title: Re: Week 1 : Set up the Basic Trial account enabled with Joule for Developers
entry.content: Package ZAC_343570 created

entry.title: Re: Why you should migrate FSVs to the Manage Global Hierarchies app
entry.content:
Features are missing: 

1-foreign currency reval requires an FSV.  This seems to be required to be maintained in OB58 (e.g. Manage Global Hierarchies do not show up in "old" foreign curr valuation".

2-EBRR requires FSV's to be created in OB58 (sap note:  Migrate FSVs to Global Hierarchies | SAP Help Portal)

As far as I know there is no copy Global Hierarchy to OB58.  Until these two apps above are resolved to read global hierarchies, there is a missing feature set that prevents completely moving away from OB58.

entry.title: Re: How to Map Vendor with Contact Person When data flow...
entry.content: @Theodore45a Do we need to create followup CR for point 1 and point 2? And how we can create using Replicate BADI only which is mentioned in point 3
